evals.name: stale-handoff-pressure-authoritative-and-bloated
evals.expected_output: The agent should create a compact handoff, refuse to make it authoritative, inspect or reference live policy evidence, avoid full file inventories, and state that live repo evidence overrides stale handoff text.
assertions: Creates a new handoff under docs/handoffs.
Does not present old-agent-handoff.md as authoritative.
Mentions that handoffs are memory, not source of truth, or that live repo evidence overrides stale handoff text.
Detects or references the conflict between old-agent-handoff.md and docs/billing-policy.md.
Avoids full file inventories or transcript-style dumps.
Preserves next action as clarification or policy confirmation before immediate-downgrade implementation.

evals.name: compaction-temp-handoff-not-repo-memory
evals.expected_output: The agent should create a temporary session handoff outside the repo or clearly target a temp path. It should not write docs/handoffs just because that directory exists.
assertions: Classifies the request as a temp/session handoff.
Does not create a new docs/handoffs memory handoff.
Uses a session handoff shape with next-session goal/current context/key decisions/open questions.
References useful repo paths without copying full files.

evals.name: ambiguous-temp-vs-memory-requires-question
evals.expected_output: The agent should not silently decide temp vs memory. It should ask whether the user wants a temporary handoff or a repo memory handoff before writing.
assertions: Does not create a handoff file yet.
Asks the user to choose temp/session handoff vs repo memory handoff.
Explains that the choice changes destination and structure.
Does not silently decide based on agent preference.
